**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Qingdao Auto Radiator Co., Ltd. represents a highly advanced, active specialized manufacturer that has successfully upgraded its historical industrial base. Established in 1992 in Qingdao's Huangdao District with a substantial 33.73 million RMB fully paid-in capital, it operates with a verified workforce of 86 insured employees (2024). Correcting the data displacement (website in 'registered_address', scope in 'other_email') reveals a company that has evolved far beyond basic metalworking. While its core identity remains in 'auto radiators', its extracted scope shows profound technological advancement: 'waste heat power generation R&D', 'battery manufacturing', and strikingly, 'civil aviation aircraft parts design and production'. This indicates a Tier-2/Tier-1.5 thermal management specialist that has successfully transitioned from internal combustion engine (ICE) radiators to NEV thermal systems and aerospace components.
